x_won_board_count: {status_rule_text} How many small boards has X won?
{status_rule_text} Count the small boards won by X.
{status_rule_text} What is the number of small boards where X has a three-in-a-row?
{status_rule_text} Determine how many small boards are won by X.
{status_rule_text} How many small boards are won by X?
o_won_board_count: {status_rule_text} How many small boards has O won?
{status_rule_text} Count the small boards won by O.
{status_rule_text} What is the number of small boards where O has a three-in-a-row?
{status_rule_text} Determine how many small boards are won by O.
{status_rule_text} How many small boards are won by O?
neither_won_board_count: {status_rule_text} How many small boards has neither player won?
{status_rule_text} Count the small boards that neither X nor O has won.
{status_rule_text} What is the number of small boards with no winner?
{status_rule_text} Determine how many small boards are not won by either player.
{status_rule_text} How many small boards have no X or O win?
drawn_board_count: {status_rule_text} How many small boards are drawn?
{status_rule_text} Count the full small boards with no winner.
{status_rule_text} What is the number of drawn small boards?
{status_rule_text} Determine how many small boards are full and unwon.
{status_rule_text} How many small boards are full and unwon?
x_winning_move_label: {tactic_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell lets X win the highlighted small board?
{tactic_rule_text} Choose the option letter for X's winning move in the highlighted small board.
{tactic_rule_text} Which empty-cell label completes a three-in-a-row for X?
{tactic_rule_text} Which labeled cell should X play to win the highlighted small board?
{tactic_rule_text} Which option is the immediate winning move for X?
o_winning_move_label: {tactic_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell lets O win the highlighted small board?
{tactic_rule_text} Choose the option letter for O's winning move in the highlighted small board.
{tactic_rule_text} Which empty-cell label completes a three-in-a-row for O?
{tactic_rule_text} Which labeled cell should O play to win the highlighted small board?
{tactic_rule_text} Which option is the immediate winning move for O?
x_blocking_move_label: {tactic_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell should X play to block O's immediate win?
{tactic_rule_text} Choose the option letter where X blocks O's threat in the highlighted small board.
{tactic_rule_text} Which empty-cell label stops O from completing three in a row?
{tactic_rule_text} Which labeled cell should X play to block O?
{tactic_rule_text} Which option is X's immediate blocking move?
o_blocking_move_label: {tactic_rule_text} Which labeled empty cell should O play to block X's immediate win?
{tactic_rule_text} Choose the option letter where O blocks X's threat in the highlighted small board.
{tactic_rule_text} Which empty-cell label stops X from completing three in a row?
{tactic_rule_text} Which labeled cell should O play to block X?
{tactic_rule_text} Which option is O's immediate blocking move?
x_immediate_win_board_count: {macro_threat_rule_text} How many small boards let X win in one move?
{macro_threat_rule_text} Count the small boards where X has an immediate winning move.
{macro_threat_rule_text} What is the number of open small boards where X can complete three in a row?
{macro_threat_rule_text} Determine how many small boards have a one-move win for X.
{macro_threat_rule_text} How many open small boards contain an immediate X win?
o_immediate_win_board_count: {macro_threat_rule_text} How many small boards let O win in one move?
{macro_threat_rule_text} Count the small boards where O has an immediate winning move.
{macro_threat_rule_text} What is the number of open small boards where O can complete three in a row?
{macro_threat_rule_text} Determine how many small boards have a one-move win for O.
{macro_threat_rule_text} How many open small boards contain an immediate O win?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_ultimate_tictactoe_bo: an Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe board made of nine small Tic-Tac-Toe boards
code_prompt_defaults.ultimate_tictactoe_status_rule_text: A small board is won by X or O when that player has three marks in a row inside that small board. A drawn small board is full and has no winner.
code_prompt_defaults.ultimate_tictactoe_tactic_rule_text: Use only the highlighted small board. A winning move places the requested mark to make three in a row; a blocking move places a mark on the only cell that stops the opponent's immediate three-in-a-row threat.
code_prompt_defaults.ultimate_tictactoe_macro_threat_rule_tex: Count only open small boards where the requested player can win in one move. Already won or drawn small boards do not count.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_x_won_board_count: set "annotation" to an array containing the [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes of all small boards won by X
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_x_won_board_count: set "answer" to the number of small boards won by X
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_o_won_board_count: set "annotation" to an array containing the [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes of all small boards won by O
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_o_won_board_count: set "answer" to the number of small boards won by O
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_neither_won_board_count: set "annotation" to an array containing the [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes of all small boards that neither player has won
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_neither_won_board_count: set "answer" to the number of small boards that neither player has won
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_drawn_board_count: set "annotation" to an array containing the [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes of all drawn small boards
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_drawn_board_count: set "answer" to the number of drawn small boards
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_x_winning_move_label: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of the selected empty-cell option
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_x_winning_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_o_winning_move_label: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of the selected empty-cell option
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_o_winning_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_x_blocking_move_label: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of the selected empty-cell option
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_x_blocking_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_o_blocking_move_label: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of the selected empty-cell option
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_o_blocking_move_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_x_immediate_win_board_co: set "annotation" to an array containing the [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes of every open small board where X can win in one move
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_x_immediate_win_board_count: set "answer" to the number of open small boards where X can win in one move
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_o_immediate_win_board_co: set "annotation" to an array containing the [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes of every open small board where O can win in one move
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_o_immediate_win_board_count: set "answer" to the number of open small boards where O can win in one move
